Palatalization refers to a shift from a sound in the front of the mouth to a sound in the back of the mouth. These types of shifts are actually quite common, as a lot of languages change their sound systems over time. Take the English words for “old” and “cold”. In Old English (also called Anglo-Saxon, or sometimes “OE”), these were pronounced as [a:dl] and [k:ld]. In Middle English (or “ME”), they were pronounced with a “d” that’s like a “t” (like in the “t” in the word “toy”), and [k]. But in Modern English, we now pronounce the “d” more like “t”, and the [k] has palatalized to a [t]. What is macular degeneration?

Assistant: Well, macular degeneration is a common condition where the cells in the center of the retina (called the macula) lose their ability to receive light.  This loss of visual function, usually due to damage to the blood vessels that supply the retina, leads to blindness in the affected eye(s).  The condition is very common in people over the age of 60.  It’s not treatable and cannot be reversed.

Human: Do you know what damages the blood vessels that supply the retina?

Assistant: Yes, it’s caused by the build up of toxic deposits (called drusen) in the eye, similar to the build up of calcium deposits in your arteries that can lead to hardening of the arteries.  The leading causes of this build up of deposits are smoking, high cholesterol levels, high blood pressure, and diabetes.

Human: Can an ophthalmologist see the drusen?

Assistant: Yes, it’s possible for an ophthalmologist to see them with an ophthalmoscope, or a slit lamp.  They also can use a test called fluorescein angiography to look at the blood flow through the retina.

Human: And can the drusen be removed?

Assistant: Not at the current time.  Even the fluorescein angiography can’t reliably show where the drusen are located.  The way this disease usually progresses is that first the blood flow slows down in the center of the retina.  In the early stages of the disease, a very low dose of a drug called a vasodilator (like Diamox) can improve the blood flow, but later this can’t be done.  The macular degeneration progresses and eventually the retina becomes disconnected from the central area of the brain that controls vision.

1/2 cup sweetened condensed milk

1/2 cup melted butter or margarine

1 tsp vanilla extract

1/2 cup flour

1/4 tsp salt

1 cup of chocolate chips

Method:

Assistant: The breakup of Yugoslavia was a process that occurred over the course of two years, starting in 1991. In March 1991, the leaders of Serbia, Croatia, and Bosnia agreed to establish a joint state called the Federal Republic of Yugoslavia.  After Serbia’s president Slobodan Milosevic threatened to create a Greater Serbia if Bosnia and Herzegovina would not agree to a centralized state, Croatia and Bosnia declared their independence in 1991.  A further agreement was made in 1992 that all the former republics would join a loose association of states known as the “Federal Republic of Yugoslavia”, and this was accepted in the U.N. as the successor state to Yugoslavia.  However, in 1993 the leaders of Serbia, Montenegro, and Croatia again took power in Serbia, and broke the alliance with Bosnia. How do home vacuums work?

Assistant: Some home vacuums have a little bristling brush that brushes across the carpet to pick up dirt, dust, and other particles.  The vacuum can be connected to a hose that goes outside, so that the dust and dirt can be sucked outside.  Inside, the dust and dirt are carried into a removable bag.  Usually, it’s easy to get these bags replaced, so that vacuuming can be done on a regular schedule, since the bags will fill up over time.  If you have a hardwood floor in your house, you’ll have to vacuum carefully to avoid scratching the floor.

Human: What are all the parts inside a vacuum?

Assistant: Vacuums usually have a main fan that pulls air out of the vacuum, then there’s the motor that turns the fan.  Then there’s the dust collection bag, which collects the dust and dirt, and is sometimes known as the “bag”.  Other parts include bristles or a brush that moves the dust into the collection bag, the collection bag holder, a hose that brings air in and out of the vacuum, and the electrical wires that provide power to the vacuum.

Human: Is there a belt in a vacuum? I remember a burning rubber smell coming from a vacuum once.

Assistant: You may be thinking of a floor vacuum, which can be used for cleaning carpets.  These tend to have a rubber belt that takes in the carpet fibers.  The rubber belt is heated to make it more efficient at picking up dirt.  This is often called a “heat and dirt” belt.  The heat and dirt belt is then pulled to the vacuum with the rest of the dirt from the floor.  Vacuums can have an electric motor or a gasoline engine, and the motor or engine powers the belt as well.  Floor vacuums have a hose that you can hook to another part of the vacuum to suck up the dirt.  It’s good to make sure that the hose isn’t kinked, so that the vacuum will work right.

Human: Is a broken vacuum easy to fix myself or will I have to take it to a company to fix it?

Assistant: A vacuum cleaner is a relatively simple machine, but it’s also easy to accidentally break it.  The bristles can become damaged or broken, or the main brush that collects dirt and dust can break or fall apart.  Most vacuums don’t have moving parts, but they can still break down.  Often if a vacuum breaks it’s because it wasn’t properly taken care of.  However, the parts are simple enough that sometimes you can repair them yourself. Why is the sky blue?

Assistant: Blue is the color of light with the shortest wavelengths, between the violet end and the green end of the spectrum.  That part of the spectrum is more easily absorbed by water in the atmosphere.  That means that it is not scattered as much by the atmosphere and gets to us directly, without having to reflect off of dust and other objects.  That makes it the brightest color of light.

Assistant: Rayleigh scattering is the process by which light interacts with gas atoms and molecules, and is responsible for creating the blue color of the sky.  Atoms and molecules interact with light because it has a property called “momentum” and the atoms have an amount of “kinetic energy” that will be transferred to the light and change the path of the light as it goes through the atmosphere.

When prisoners on death row get the lethal injection, do they feel any pain? I have heard conflicting opinions about this.

Assistant: The question of whether or not inmates “feel” pain from lethal injections is debatable.  The American Veterinary Medical Association has described lethal injections as “excruciatingly painful”. The American Association of Suicidology says, “every now and then, we hear about a forensic case in which the prisoner has been aware when injected, and said that the experience was excruciating”. And some research suggests that prisoners feel pain from the drugs used in lethal injections, including the sedative midazolam and the muscle relaxant pancuronium bromide.  Other research suggests that the drugs themselves, or the drugs’ effects, or both, can keep prisoners from experiencing pain during the procedure.  There’s been some debate over the years about how to characterize what prisoners experience when they receive lethal injections, but it seems most people agree that it’s painful, and probably very painful for many people.

How do I make chocolate chip cookies?

Assistant: You can use a basic recipe:

Ingredients:

1 cup unsalted butter, softened

1 cup brown sugar

2 eggs

1 teaspoon vanilla extract

1 3/4 cups flour

1 teaspoon baking powder

1/2 teaspoon salt

1/2 teaspoon baking soda

2 cups chocolate chips

Preparation:

Heat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, cream together butter and brown sugar. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until fully incorporated. Add vanilla and beat well.

In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt and baking soda. Stir until well combined. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients, alternating between flour mixture and chocolate chips. 

Bake in preheated oven for 8 to 10 minutes, until a toothpick inserted in the centre of the cookies comes out clean.

The pharynx is just the throat, and is divided into the nasopharynx, the oropharynx, and the laryngopharynx.  The larynx is divided into the larynx, the epiglottis, and the trachea.  The larynx is a hollow organ that houses the vocal cords and the glottis.  The bronchi are air passages that branch from the trachea and conduct air to the lungs.

The blood then travels through a system of arteries and veins, carrying oxygen and nutrients to tissues and returning waste products to the lungs.  The left lung also has two lobes, the left upper lobe and the left lower lobe.  The right lung is separated into three lobes: the right upper lobe, the right middle lobe, and the right lower lobe. Often grief can be seen as a mixture of many other emotions, but in the main it is often experienced as a more negative state of mind than sadness. How can I clarify butter?

Assistant: If you are making homemade butter, you should warm your milk and cream on the stove until just the first bubbles form around the edges, and stir continuously to keep the temperature around 100 degrees. Then remove the pan from the heat.  Next add a bit of lemon juice or vinegar.  Carefully skim off the foam.  Add the clarifying agent, usually vinegar or lemon juice, and stir again.  Pour the liquid butter into a bowl and set it aside, ideally in a cool place.  After a while, the watery liquid will separate from the butter.  Skim the top layer off to get your clarifying butter, which can be poured into a clean jar.  You can now make the final butter that will be used for cooking or baking by slowly adding the watery liquid to the jar of clarified butter.  This will help incorporate the fat from the liquid into the clarified butter.

And the third is to remove toxic materials from the bloodstream, and these are often large protein molecules.  A single kidney can do all of these things, but it can’t do it all at once. Human: Great! Where does it originate?

Assistant: It was originally from the Provençal region of France, but the modern dish is also associated with the city of Nice, and with the Italian region of Tuscany.   In the 1960s, there was a boom in the popularity of “nouvelle cuisine” (or “new cooking”), which was a very abstract and artistic style of cooking, very different from the Provençal style.  Some chefs of the time experimented with eggplant, and combined it with tomato sauce, and added the eggplant to this to be able to make it fast and easier. This resulted in a sort of classic dish, that’s still around.

Human: Can you give me a traditional recipe for it?

Assistant: Sure, I’ll make one.  Here it is:

•  1 small eggplant

•  3 tablespoons olive oil

•  2 cloves garlic

•  1 small zucchini

•  2 tomatoes

•  a small sprig of thyme

•  salt, pepper, vinegar


First, you’ll peel the zucchini and eggplant, and cut them into rounds.  The size of the slices will depend on what size your zucchini and eggplant are.  

Then you’ll saute the eggplant and zucchini, in a tablespoon of olive oil, and a clove of garlic, on each side, until they’re nicely browned on each side, but not burned.  Then you’ll put them into a bowl, and dice up the tomatoes and pour them into the same bowl.  Add the juice from the tomato into the bowl, so it will be a nice sauce. 

Then you’ll add salt, pepper, vinegar, and thyme to taste, and mix together.  I recommend you add the vinegar at the last minute, or the zucchini will soak up all of it.

Are prepaid cards worth it?

Assistant: There are a number of different cards. Some cards are tied to a specific store. Some cards allow you to buy something for a lower price, and pay back the card in monthly installments. Some cards allow you to make purchases up to a certain amount at the moment, but then charge interest on the balance after the point of purchase.  The interest is generally one percent, or two percent a month.  On a $25 balance, for example, you might end up paying $1.25 interest in the long run.  You might be willing to pay this much, or maybe you might not.  Some prepaid cards allow you to spend a fixed amount and only charge interest on amounts over this.  Generally speaking, a prepaid card is not as good as a debit card.  If you’re a normal person and not someone like a high-school student who wants to buy a bunch of stuff at the mall without your parents noticing, I don’t think there are any particular benefits to prepaid cards.  If you find that you have lots of transactions in which you would otherwise pay a fee with a credit card or debit card, then prepaid cards might be useful.

Can sitting down for too long do harm to my back? I am on the computer for 8-10 hours a day and am worried about the long term consequences.

Assistant: The long-term consequences of sitting for too long are very few, assuming that your back is properly supported when you are sitting down.  Back pain that is caused by prolonged sitting in an office is usually a result of bad posture.  Try these tips to avoid back pain and problems:

-   Maintain good posture.  Try to maintain a straight back, shoulders down, stomach sucked in, and keep your head up.
-   Use a proper chair and/or a lumbar support cushion.  Be sure to get up and move frequently, to break up the stress on your spine.  A good tip is to get up every 20 minutes, move around and stretch, and return to your chair.
-   Don’t sit cross-legged, or with feet on chair.  Sit in a chair with your feet flat on the floor.  You can also try to put your feet on a footstool.
-   Avoid prolonged sitting on the floor.

What is the difference between Peruvian ceviche and Mexican ceviche?

Assistant: The core principles are the same: raw, partially-cooked seafood and spicy raw onions, with maybe some seasonings and hot pepper, and maybe a squeeze of lime juice.  Both styles are from the coastal regions of Central America, where they eat lots of seafood.  In Peru, you might say “ceviche”, but in Mexico you might say “ceviche”.

Assistant: Sure!  If you haven’t tried Peruvian ceviche, a helpful resource is the restaurant at the Peruvian embassy in Washington DC: https://www.peru.org/learn-about-peru/about-peru/visiting-peru/activities/ceviche.html.   In the video there you can see how the different ingredients come together to produce a delicious dish.  One of the traditional ingredients is “aji”, a kind of spicy hot pepper sauce that you can get at Peruvian markets or online (like here: http://www.amazon.com/Aji-Peruvian-Hot-Pepper-Chile-Estate-28-oz/dp/B004X3HYR6/ref=sr_1_3?ie=UTF8&qid=1457698877&sr=8-3&keywords=aji ).   It’s used to give the ceviche its spicy kick.  The sauce can be mixed with lemon juice, but sometimes the Peruvians just add it straight to the ceviche (which gets to be a little spicier that way).  Then you have the seafood itself (e.g. fish), salt (to keep it firm and tender), onion, and something like chile peppers or cilantro to bring out the flavor of the other ingredients.

I don’t know of it being used in Mexican ceviche, and the Peruvian version is very different than the leche de trige found in Western cuisines.  In Peru the leche de trige that’s used in ceviche usually comes in a paste.  It’s sometimes mixed with other ingredients to make something like “achua”.  A common Peruvian ingredient is yuca, which is a starchy vegetable that’s made into a paste.  Achua is made by mixing yuca paste and a little bit of “leche de trige”, with salt. Assistant: Ah, that’s a really good question, and I’m glad you asked it!  Asthma is a very common chronic disease which makes the airways in your lungs inflamed and narrow, which then interferes with breathing.  The treatment of asthma is quite varied, but the most important part is controlling symptoms of inflammation with medicine.  Symptoms can vary, but can include coughing and trouble breathing.  Sometimes symptoms also happen as soon as you breathe in, so it’s also called “reactive airway disease”.

Assistant: Exercise is generally considered to be beneficial for people with asthma. It’s a good idea for people with asthma to stay physically active and do things that keep their lungs working well, so it’s not a total roadblock.  Maybe not swimming or running, though, if those are your only exercise options! Assistant: The core principles are the same: raw, partially-cooked seafood and spicy raw onions, with maybe some seasonings and hot pepper, and maybe a squeeze of lime juice. Assistant: Sure!  If you haven’t tried Peruvian ceviche, a helpful resource is the restaurant at the Peruvian embassy in Washington DC: https://www.peru.org/learn-about-peru/about-peru/visiting-peru/activities/ceviche.html.   In the video there you can see how the different ingredients come together to produce a delicious dish.  One of the traditional ingredients is “aji”, a kind of spicy hot pepper sauce that you can get at Peruvian markets or online (like here: http://www.amazon.com/Aji-Peruvian-Hot-Pepper-Chile-Estate-28-oz/dp/B004X3HYR6/ref=sr_1_3?ie=UTF8&qid=1457698877&sr=8-3&keywords=aji ). 3 slices of liver

1⁄2 cup grated ginger

2 tablespoons of vinegar

1 tablespoon of salt

3 tablespoons of black pepper

2 medium onions

What should I do if I find mold in my house?

Assistant: This depends on how much mold there is, and what sort of mold. One thing to be aware of is that black mold smells bad and it’s visible, whereas other molds might only be visible under a microscope.  

Another thing to consider is if the mold is dangerous in any way. Black mold, or Stachybotrys, is a “mycotoxin” that can make you ill, and should be removed if possible, but it’s not really something you should worry about in your case.  

If you have a simple mold problem, a relatively harmless kind of mold or fungus, and it’s not growing or spreading in an aggressive way, you might consider just trying to remove the mold yourself. You could use a vacuum, a wet-dry shop vacuum is one option, or a brush, like a stiff broom or straw broom, if you have the strength for it.  But if it’s black mold, you should probably call in a specialist, and your insurance might cover a cleanup, especially if you find it in high-value areas.

Human: How do I know if it's black mold?

Assistant: Good question!  First of all, black mold is dark or black in color.  If it’s still a visible mold growing on wet surfaces, it will have a noticeable growth pattern, and you might find that it looks a bit furry or fuzzy.  If it’s not growing, but you see it on dry surfaces or dark spaces, it will have a dust-like appearance.  Also, if you have pet animals, the odor of black mold is kind of rotten or smoky, like old cigars.  

The danger of black mold is that it releases some compounds that are dangerous to us, including some mycotoxins.  These can cause mild infections and allergies in the respiratory system, and are also toxic to some other animals, such as cats, dogs, birds, and lizards.  However, most people aren’t affected by these kinds of mycotoxins, and when it’s contained in a house, most homeowners can simply clean it out and get rid of it safely.
